current_session.context: Frontend excellence sprint planning + SAPE activation

velocity_multiplier.finding: AI-assisted development achieves 8-10x velocity (4000 LOC/day vs 450 LOC/day assumed)
velocity_multiplier.impact: 15-day sprint can deliver full 6,000 LOC scope in 5-7 days
velocity_multiplier.application: Revise all future timeline estimates with this multiplier

ihsan_scoring_formula.note: MVP can ship at 85%+ with explicit beta designation

frontend_health_calculation.note: Requires 40 components OR 90%+ test coverage to hit 85%+

scope_reduction.decision: Ship 3 perfect workflows (auth + dashboard + 1 agent) at 95%+ quality vs 7 workflows at 70%
scope_reduction.rationale: Maintains Ihsan threshold, enables rapid feedback, reduces risk

technology_stack.reasoning: Proven stack, excellent performance, mature ecosystem

deployment_strategy.approach: Beta launch at 85%+ health → 95%+ within 60 days post-launch
deployment_strategy.rationale: Real user feedback more valuable than perfectionism

backend_production_ready.significance: Core orchestration engine ready for production

context_kernel_created.significance: Persistent configuration system enabling efficient session initialization

user_abandonment_validation.question: Does 44% frontend health truly cause 80% user abandonment?

optimal_agent_count.question: Should MVP launch with 1 agent, 3 agents, or all 18 agents?
considerations: Validate value prop (need at least 3 for multi-agent synthesis)

pricing_model.question: What pricing structure aligns with value delivery and sustainability?

context_inefficiency.blocker: Rebuilding context every session wastes 10-15 minutes

insights_log.source: Sprint Zero validation (374 LOC in 45 minutes)
insights_log.application: Revise all timeline estimates; can deliver full scope much faster

insights_log.insight: Quality vs velocity is false dichotomy; solution is scoped excellence
insights_log.application: Ship fewer features at higher quality rather than many at lower quality

insights_log.insight: Persistent kernel configuration dramatically improves session efficiency
insights_log.source: Mumo's suggestion inspired by Claude Code / Claude Flow patterns
insights_log.application: Load kernel at session start for instant context activation

overbuild_undership.description: Tendency to build exceptional backend while under-investing in UX
overbuild_undership.impact: Creates adoption barriers despite technical excellence
overbuild_undership.mitigation: Front-load UX work, validate with users early

perfectionism_paralysis.description: 95%+ Ihsan standard can delay shipping when applied uniformly
perfectionism_paralysis.impact: Delays market feedback, increases risk of building wrong features
perfectionism_paralysis.mitigation: Progressive disclosure: ship 95%+ core features, iterate on secondary features

tool_proliferation.description: 116 repositories with valuable insights scattered across laptop
tool_proliferation.impact: Difficulty accessing past breakthroughs, duplication of effort
tool_proliferation.mitigation: Temporal-archaeological mining to extract and consolidate value

admin_panel.rationale: Not critical for beta user value

recommended_start: Continue from last checkpoint or start new hook

metadata.retention_policy: Keep all history, archive after 90 days
